Black walnuts fall from the tree here to the road, dozens of them. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.

right next to the tree break and worn access to the stream. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

There's a healthy grove of Pawpaw here in this little parking lot oasis. Quite fruitful (at least this year).
